zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Geoffrey Luttrell於大約1315年出生在英國林可爾史爾易爾納姆時，他的父親Geoffrey de Luttrell III40歲，母親Agnes Sutton26歲。他和Constance Scrope至少有1個女兒。他去世於大約1390年在他的家鄉享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Geoffrey Luttrell于大约1315年出生在英国林可爾史爾易爾納姆时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Luttrell III40岁，母亲Agnes Sutton26岁。他和Constance Scrope至少有1个女儿。他去世于大约1390年在他的家乡享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Luttrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Geoffrey Luttrell was born about 1315, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, was 40 and his mother, Agnes Sutton, was 26. He had at least 1 daughter with Constance Scrope. He died about 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Geoffrey Luttrell est né environ 1315, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Agnes Sutton, avait 26 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Constance Scrope. Il est décédé environ 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Geoffrey Luttrell um 1315 in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Luttrell III 40 und seine Mutter Agnes Sutton 26. Er hatte mit Constance Scrope mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1390 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Luttrell è nato il circa 1315 nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Sutton, aveva 26 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Constance Scrope. Morì circa 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Luttrellが約1315年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Luttrell IIIは40歳，母Agnes Suttonは26歳であった。彼はConstance Scropeとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1390年に故郷で77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Geoffrey Luttrell(이)가 대략 1315년 영국 링코실르 언함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Luttrell III(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Sutton(은)는 26세였다. 그는 Constance Scrope(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1390년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Geoffrey Luttrell nasceu aproximadamente 1315, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Sutton, tinha 26 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Constance Scrope. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Geoffrey Luttrell родился около 1315 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Luttrell III было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Sutton, 26. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Constance Scrope. Он умер около 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Geoffrey Luttrell nació aproximadamente 1315, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Luttrell III, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Agnes Sutton, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Constance Scrope. Murió aproximadamente 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años.
